eligibility_policy.renal_program_flag_source: The candidate row target_condition value renal_diabetes is the renal program flag. Do not require a separate CKD diagnosis or a literal renal_diabetes diagnosis string in clinical_history.

disposition_policy.signed_consent_with_missing_chart_consen: hold for chart update rather than requesting a new consent packet
disposition_policy.draft_vitals_or_draft_renal_labs: treat as missing recent chart artifacts
